summary: This topic explains how to configure the automatic generation of unique receipt numbers for all financial transactions made during the admission process.
steps: Set a prefix for the receipt numbers (e.g., 'SDI' for SDI University).
The system will automatically generate sequential numbers following the prefix, starting from 1 (or the next available counter number).
business_rules: Receipt numbers are automatically generated by the system.
A unique prefix can be defined for receipt numbers.
important_notes: The prefix for receipt numbers can be provided by the client or created based on their requirements.
The counter updates automatically, ensuring unique receipt numbers for each transaction.
questions: How do I configure automatic receipt numbering for admission transactions?
Where can I set the prefix for transaction receipts?
What is the purpose of the receipt counter in transaction setup?
related_topics: Stage Transaction Mapping and Amount Editability
